title: “Tesla's Technology is Still Classified!" (Ft. Senate Staffer Kirk McConnell)
summary: Kirk McConnell, a retired Senate Armed Services Committee staffer, discusses his investigation into UAP phenomena following the 2017 New York Times article. He shares his belief that the US government has made significant progress on understanding UAP technology, discusses historical connections between Nazi research, Tesla's work, and modern exotic physics theories, and describes meeting with credible witnesses who claim knowledge of recovered craft and reverse-engineering programs.

acronyms.definition: Modern term for UFOs used by government and military
Pentagon program that studied UAP, funded by Harry Reid from 2007-2012
Technology used in wallets to block digital pickpocketing
US intelligence agency that convened the Robertson Panel
US law enforcement agency that seized Tesla's files after his death
Predecessor to NASA that investigated aeronautics and propulsion

organizations_mentioned: Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence

events.description: Leslie Kean and Ralph Blumenthal publish seminal New York Times article revealing AATIP program and UAP videos
Nimitz Tic Tac UAP encounter with pilots Dave Fravor and Alex Dietrich
UFO flyovers over Washington DC on July 19-20 and 26-27, leading to Robertson Panel formation
Nikola Tesla dies at the New Yorker Hotel
James Clerk Maxwell develops equations on electromagnetism
Ghost rockets appear in Sweden, General James Doolittle sent to investigate

key_claims.claim: The US government has made significant progress understanding UAP technology that is hidden from the public
Multiple credible witnesses with high-level clearances have come to Congress claiming knowledge of recovered craft and reverse-engineering programs
Tesla believed he achieved overunity - receiving more energy than he transmitted wirelessly
Tesla traveled to Europe to meet with Hertz to convince him his electromagnetic wave theory was wrong
Howard Robertson and Luis Alvarez investigated foo fighters during WWII and later led the Robertson Panel
Some of Tesla's technology remains classified by the US government
Thomas Townsend Brown's work is still classified by the Navy
Witnesses coming forward to Congress about UAP have expressed genuine fear for their safety, with one visibly shaking
David Grusch experienced hardships not even in the public domain as consequence of coming forward
The Nazi bell program used counterrotating cylinders with red mercury compound to produce levitation effects
Dick Cheney was reportedly a gatekeeper for legacy UFO efforts
